args: _C="${CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR:-$HOME/.claude}"; _E="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}"; _P=""; for _c in "$_E" $(ls -dt "$_C/plugins/cache/local-progress-memory/claude-progress-memory"/*/ 2>/dev/null) "$HOME/claude-progress-memory/plugin"; do { [ -n "$_c" ] && [ -f "$_c/scripts/mcp-server.js" ]; } && { _P="$_c"; break; }; done; [ -n "$_P" ] || { echo "progress-memory: mcp-server.js not found" >&2; exit 1; }; export PATH="$($SHELL -lc 'echo $PATH' 2>/dev/null):$PATH"; exec node "$_P/scripts/mcp-server.js"
